summary: Phase 3 expansion testing completed successfully. All 26 backend tests passed (100%). New features tested: Time-series sales forecasting (7/14/30 days, viral probability), Shopify store tracking (add/remove stores, revenue estimates), Creator Marketplace two-sided (sellers post briefs, creators apply). Native app project verified at /app/native-app/ (Expo WebView wrapper).

issues: Minor eslint warning: useEffect has missing dependency 'loadUser' (not blocking)

passed_tests: POST /api/admin/login with correct credentials returns JWT token
GET /api/forecast/product/{id} returns forecast with metrics (requires auth)
GET /api/forecast/top-forecasts returns ranked products by 7d forecast (requires auth)
POST /api/stores/add creates a tracked store (requires auth)
GET /api/stores returns tracked stores list (requires auth)
POST /api/marketplace/briefs creates a new brief (requires auth)
GET /api/marketplace/briefs/{id} returns brief detail with applications
critical_code_review_comments: Native app eas.json has placeholder values for Apple/Google credentials (expected for initial setup)
Store tracking data is SIMULATED (generated on add) - not real Shopify API integration
Forecast uses mathematical model with decay factor, not external ML API
seed_data_creation: Test briefs and stores created during testing, cleanup performed for TEST_ prefixed stores
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 adds: (1) Forecast endpoints at /api/forecast/* for time-series sales predictions with viral probability, (2) Store tracking at /api/stores/* for Shopify store monitoring (SIMULATED data), (3) Creator Marketplace at /api/marketplace/* for two-sided briefs and applications. All new endpoints require subscription auth (admin JWT works). Native app at /app/native-app/ is Expo WebView wrapper pointing to alphadrop.org. Previous iterations 1-7 features still working.

mocked_apis.store_tracking: Store data is simulated/generated on add - not real Shopify API
mocked_apis.forecast: Uses mathematical model with exponential decay, not external ML service
